posts.cookedHtml: Will this be available to view after the event? I’m not willing to commit to the 4AM local live time that’s posted.

@Omer
Sounds great. The Monday Wizard team will be there as well. Looking forward to learning more about how monday AI blocks can help reduce manual work and drive smarter, faster decisions.
